translations.it: La nostra città ha molti abitanti.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们的小镇有很多居民。
translations.yue: 我哋嗰個小鎮有好多居民。
translations.vi: Thị trấn của chúng tôi có nhiều người dân.
translations.hi: हमारे शहर में बहुत लोग रहते हैं.
translations.el: Η πόλη μας έχει πολλούς κατοίκους.
translations.ja: 私たちの町には住民がたくさんいます。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner (1st person plural), agrees with feminine singular noun in nominative; modifies 'Stadt' (subject).
Common noun, feminine, nominative singular; syntactic subject of 'hat'.
Finite main verb, 3rd person singular present.
Quantifier determiner, plural; modifies 'Einwohner' as part of the direct object (accusative plural).
Common noun, typically masculine; plural accusative; direct object of 'hat'.

sentences.target: Als Einwohner kennt er die Gegend gut.
sentences.reading: /als ˈaɪ̯nvoːnɐ kɛnt eːɐ diː ˈɡeːɡənt ɡuːt/

translations.de: Als Einwohner kennt er die Gegend gut.
translations.ipa: /als ˈaɪ̯nvoːnɐ kɛnt eːɐ diː ˈɡeːɡənt ɡuːt/
translations.en: As a resident, he knows the area well.
translations.es: Como residente, conoce bien la zona.
translations.fr: En tant qu’habitant, il connaît bien le coin.
translations.it: Da residente, conosce bene la zona.
translations.ko: 그는 이 동네 사람이라서 이 근처를 잘 알아요.
translations.zh-Hans: 作为本地居民，他很熟悉这一带。
translations.yue: 作為本地居民，佢好熟呢一帶。
translations.ru: Как местный житель, он хорошо знает этот район.
translations.pt: Como morador, ele conhece bem a região.
translations.he: כתושב המקום הוא מכיר את האזור היטב.
translations.tr: Burada oturduğu için bölgeyi iyi biliyor.
translations.vi: Là cư dân địa phương, anh ấy rất rành khu vực này.
translations.ar: بصفته من السكان المحليين، فهو يعرف المنطقة جيدًا.
translations.nl: Als inwoner kent hij de buurt goed.
translations.uk: Як місцевий житель він добре знає цей район.
translations.hu: Helyi lakosként jól ismeri a környéket.
translations.hi: स्थानीय निवासी होने के नाते वह इस इलाके को अच्छी तरह जानता है.
translations.pl: Jako mieszkaniec dobrze zna tę okolicę.
translations.el: Ως κάτοικος γνωρίζει καλά την περιοχή.
translations.nb: Som innbygger kjenner han området godt.
translations.id: Sebagai warga setempat, dia sangat mengenal daerah ini.
translations.sv: Som invånare känner han området väl.
translations.ro: Ca locuitor, el cunoaște bine zona.
translations.cs: Jako místní obyvatel dobře zná tuto oblast.
translations.da: Som beboer kender han området godt.
translations.ja: 住民として彼はこの辺りに詳しいです。

tokens.explanation: Preposition meaning 'as', introducing a predicative NP; governs nominative.
Common noun, singular nominative within the 'als'-phrase; predicative complement referring to 'er'.
Finite main verb, 3rd person singular present.
Personal pronoun, 3rd person masculine singular nominative; subject of 'kennt'.
Definite article, feminine singular accusative; modifies 'Gegend' (direct object).
Common noun, feminine, accusative singular; direct object of 'kennt'.
Adverb of manner; modifies the verb 'kennt'.

sentences.target: Euer Dorf hat nur wenige Einwohner.

translations.de: Euer Dorf hat nur wenige Einwohner.
translations.en: Your village has only a few residents.
translations.es: Vuestro pueblo tiene solo unos pocos habitantes.
translations.fr: Votre village n’a que quelques habitants.
translations.it: Il vostro villaggio ha solo pochi abitanti.
translations.ko: 너희 마을에는 주민이 몇 명밖에 없어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 你们的村子只有很少的居民。
translations.yue: 你哋個村只有好少居民。
translations.ru: В вашей деревне всего несколько жителей.
translations.pt: A aldeia de vocês tem apenas alguns moradores.
translations.vi: Làng của các bạn chỉ có ít người dân.
translations.ar: في قريتكم عدد قليل من السكان.
translations.nl: Jullie dorp heeft maar weinig inwoners.
translations.uk: Ваше село має лише небагато мешканців.
translations.hu: A falutokban csak kevés lakos él.
translations.hi: तुम्हारे गाँव में बहुत कम लोग रहते हैं.
translations.pl: Wasza wieś ma tylko kilku mieszkańców.
translations.el: Το χωριό σας έχει μόνο λίγους κατοίκους.
translations.nb: Landsbyen deres har bare få innbyggere.
translations.id: Desa kalian hanya memiliki sedikit penduduk.
translations.sv: Er by har bara få invånare.
translations.ro: Satul vostru are doar câțiva locuitori.
translations.cs: Vaše vesnice má jen málo obyvatel.
translations.da: Jeres landsby har kun få indbyggere.
translations.fi: Teidän kylässänne on vain vähän asukkaita.
translations.ja: あなたたちの村には住民が少ししかいません。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner (2nd person plural), agrees with neuter singular noun in nominative; modifies 'Dorf' (subject).
Common noun, neuter, nominative singular; syntactic subject of 'hat'.
Finite main verb, 3rd person singular present.
Focus particle/adverb limiting scope; modifies the quantity expressed by 'wenige'.
Quantifier determiner, plural; modifies 'Einwohner' as part of the direct object (accusative plural).
Common noun, plural accusative; direct object of 'hat'.

sentences.target: Die Einwohner protestieren vor dem Rathaus.

translations.de: Die Einwohner protestieren vor dem Rathaus.
translations.en: The residents are protesting in front of the town hall.
translations.es: Los vecinos están protestando frente al ayuntamiento.
translations.fr: Les habitants manifestent devant l’hôtel de ville.
translations.it: I residenti protestano davanti al municipio.
translations.ko: 주민들이 시청 앞에서 시위를 하고 있어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 居民们在市政厅前抗议。
translations.yue: 居民喺市政大樓門口抗議。
translations.pt: Os moradores estão protestando em frente à prefeitura.
translations.tr: Sakinler belediye binasının önünde protesto ediyor.
translations.vi: Người dân đang biểu tình trước tòa thị chính.
translations.nl: De bewoners demonstreren voor het gemeentehuis.
translations.hu: A lakosok a városháza előtt tüntetnek.
translations.hi: निवासी नगर भवन के बाहर प्रदर्शन कर रहे हैं.
translations.el: Οι κάτοικοι διαμαρτύρονται μπροστά στο δημαρχείο.
translations.id: Warga sedang berdemo di depan balai kota.
translations.ja: 住民が市役所の前で抗議しています。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, plural nominative; modifies 'Einwohner' (subject).
Common noun, plural nominative; syntactic subject of 'protestieren'.
Finite main verb, present, 3rd person plural.
Preposition governing dative; introduces a locative PP.
Definite article, dative singular (neuter here); modifies 'Rathaus'.
Common noun, neuter, dative singular; object of the preposition 'vor'.
